windows.command: New-Item './ansible/roles/${input:role}/tasks' -ItemType Directory -Force && New-Item './ansible/roles/${input:role}/tasks/main.yml' -ItemType File && New-Item './ansible/roles/${input:role}/tasks/macosx.yml' -ItemType File && New-Item './ansible/roles/${input:role}/tasks/windows.yml' -ItemType File

inputs.description: Enter the name of the role
